name: Francesca Prelati
description:
Francesca is a main antagonist from Fate/Strange Fake. She is the true master of caster during the "True & False Holy Grail Wars". Originally a male named Francois, she existed during the era of Joan of Arc and was a friend of Gilles. She was a mage who assisted him but aided in driving him to madness. Her past overall is a mystery aside from her origin of magecraft was tied to those associated with Merlin himself. She was also the child of the Greek goddess Até. Due to her magecraft, she died numerous times and the first time allowed her to be recorded as a heroic spirit but in total she has died nearly 30 times most of which were due to a conflict with Touko, a female mage. She even got involved in the second grail wars of Fuyuki to which some aspects got her attention including Gilles' presence but circumstances prevented her from interfering. After that she would orchestrate a grail war of her own using artifacts and other means somewhere in America and even appointing masters for it.

Francesca is a young woman with ankle length light coloured hair that has skull patterns near the ends. She wears a dark ribbon in her hair and a vertically striped top with a short skirt. She also wears a visible garterbelt connected to stockings with bone patterns on them and boots with eye and teeth like designs adorning them. Finally, she wears a pair of fingerless gloves that go up to just below her shoulders and carries an umbrella with her. Orlando's insulting of her may imply she is older than she appears. Apparently, there is a zipper-like opening on her body made of teeth that extends from her ribs to below her navel.

Her particular form of magecraft gave her a form of immortality through reincarnation. She also has influence of certain organizations during the grail war including artifacts certain to summon mighty servants.
creator: AnimeMan1993
